description: Ordered list of issues for the secrets-consolidation refactor. Replaces all .env variables (except AWS_REGION, AWS_SECRET_ARN, AWS_DB_SECRET_ARN) with AWS Secrets Manager values. Renames IAPISecrets → IAppSecrets with UPPER_SNAKE_CASE fields, removes isLocal(), deletes legacy helper modules, and updates knexfile to fetch DB credentials from AWS.
